entries.title: Syndio Accelerates Agentic AI Roadmap With Embrace.ai Buy
entries.summary: Syndio has acquired Embrace.ai to accelerate Syndio’s agentic artificial intelligence roadmap for its Decision Intelligence for Pay platform. The Syndio platform already helps global organizations analyze, govern and improve pay decisions at scale, and the addition of Embrace.ai’s AI-forward team will help it expand the platform with new agentic capabilities, Syndio said in a […] The post Sy

entries.title: Physical AI Is Forcing Insurers to Start From Scratch
entries.summary: Physical artificial intelligence (AI) doesn’t follow a script. Unlike traditional machines that execute fixed commands, physical AI systems use sensors, software and AI models to decide how to act as conditions change. That flexibility is also what breaks the liability framework traditional policies was built to handle. When something goes wrong, the fault rarely […] The post Physical AI Is

entries.title: AI Solves the SKU Problem That Stalled Warehouse Automation
entries.summary: Swiss eCommerce logistics provider MS Direct, which moves more than 32 million items a year, has deployed a robot from Stuttgart-based Sereact that picks and packs orders without per-item training, eliminating a requirement that has long blocked most warehouse operators from full automation. The robot handles roughly 1,500 single-item orders per day at the […] The post AI Solves the SKU Prob

entries.title: UBS demonstrates implementation of compliance checks on transactions crossing Ethereum
entries.summary: UBS and blockchain engineering firm Nethermind have successfully completed two joint proofs of concept demonstrating that the public Ethereum network can support the operational and compliance requirements of top tier financial institutions.

entries.title: Starling rolls out AI-powered romance scam detection feature
entries.summary: Starling Bank has rolled out an AI-powered feature designed to detect romance scammers, investment heists and deepfake phishing attempts.

entries.title: AIB revamps mobile app
entries.summary: Ireland's AIB has given its mobile app its biggest makeover in a decade, promising customers a "complete financial experience".

entries.title: Lawmakers Fast-Track Bipartisan Housing Bill With CBDC Ban
entries.summary: A four-year ban on the development of a U.S. central bank digital currency (CBDC) is included in a housing affordability bill that was passed Monday night (June 22) by the Senate. The bipartisan bill, the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, passed the Senate on a vote of 85 to 5 and now heads to […] The post Lawmakers Fast-Track Bipartisan Housing Bill With CBDC Ban appeared first on PYMNTS.co

entries.title: Galaxy Digital invests in Digital Prime Technologies
entries.summary: Digital Prime Technologies, a provider of institutional digital asset technology solutions, today announced a strategic investment from Galaxy Digital (Nasdaq: GLXY), a global leader in digital assets and data center infrastructure.

entries.title: Broadridge appoints Mark Nichols co-president, digital assets
entries.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR) today announced that Mark Nichols has joined the company as Co-President, Digital Assets, a move that reinforces Broadridge’s ongoing commitment to modernize financial market infrastructure and expand its digital asset capabilities.

entries.title: Kraken parent secures British Virgin Islands license
entries.summary: Payward, a unified financial infrastructure platform and the parent company of Kraken, has today announced it has secured Virtual Asset Service Provider (VASP) registrations from the British Virgin Islands Financial Services Commission (BVI FSC).

entries.title: Mosta launches stablecoin for instant cross-border settlement
entries.summary: Mosta, the AI-native business banking platform for global companies and AI agents, today announced the launch of MainUSD, its own U.S. dollar stablecoin issued by Brale, a U.S.-regulated stablecoin issuance provider.

entries.title: Polymarket Lands Bundesliga Deal, the Data Agreement Is Still Missing
entries.summary: Polymarket has secured Bundesliga branding rights in the US, but the official data agreement behind the partnership remains open, which will directly affect the depth of markets at launch. entries.summary: World Cup sponsorships for predictions markets ADI Predictstreet and Fanatics Markets coincide with noticeable increases in Google search interest for both brands around the 2026 FIFA tournament window. entries.title: Judge rules against Fiserv
entries.summary: The federal court decision denied the payment processor’s motion to dismiss a credit union’s lawsuit in California. It’s one in a pack brought by such financial institutions nationwide.

entries.title: eToro Enables Digital ID Verification for Singapore Traders via Singpass
entries.summary: eToro has announced an integration with Singpass, allowing users in Singapore to register and verify their accounts using the national digital identity system. In July 2025, eToro expanded into Singapore after activating its Capital Markets Services licence from the Monetary Authority of Singapore.
